text:
Once upon a time in a small, quaint village nestled among the rolling hills, there was a little girl named Lily who loved nothing more than to explore the woods behind her house. One sunny afternoon, she decided to venture deeper into the forest than ever before.

As she walked, she stumbled upon a tiny cottage hidden among the trees. The door was slightly ajar, and inside, she could hear soft, melodic singing. Curiosity getting the better of her, Lily pushed open the door and stepped inside.

The cottage was warm and cozy, filled with sunlight filtering through the windows. In the center of the room sat an old woman, knitting a blanket and humming a happy tune. She looked up as Lily entered and smiled warmly.

"Welcome, dear child," said the old woman. "I am Qwen, and you are most welcome here."

Lily's eyes widened with wonder. "Who are you?" she asked.

"I am Q, the creator of all things joyful and kind
